steps.title: Substitute for the repeated expression
steps.content:
The expression $(3x+6)$ appears on both sides of the equation. Set $u = 3x + 6$ to simplify. The equation becomes:

$$5u = 3u + 78$$

steps.title: Solve for u
steps.content:
Subtract $3u$ from both sides:

$$5u - 3u = 78$$
$$2u = 78$$
$$u = 39$$

Since $u = 3x + 6$, we have $3x + 6 = 39$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
